name: orq-trace
description: Automatically trace Claude Code sessions to Orq. Captures sessions, turns, tool calls, and LLM responses as hierarchical OTLP spans.

ORQ_API_KEY.title: Orq API Key
ORQ_API_KEY.description: Optional. Leave blank to use ORQ_API_KEY env var or the orq CLI profile (see plugin docs for resolution order).
